item.name: Light Bulb
item.description: Shine bright like a diamond! All stats up!

item.name: Dead Spider
item.description: The webs are all over my face! RUN!

item.name: Playdough
item.active_effect: Hold to create a temporary platform. Can be used in the air.

item.name: Playdough Cake
item.active_effect: Heal 1 heart and gain temporary invincibility for 5 seconds.

item.name: Playdough Shield
item.effect: Reflects projectiles for 5 seconds after taking damage. 20% chance to natrually block damage.

item.name: Burnt Compass
item.description: Reveals and opens secret rooms on the map!
item.effect: Reveals the layout of the current room and opens any hidden doors.

item.name: Charred Key
item.description: I could've found this on my own..

item.name: Molotov
item.active_effect: Throw a molotov that creates a temporary fire on the ground, damaging enemies that walk over it.

item.name: Charger
item.active_effect: Electrocute enemies for 50% of their health while doing leaving you with half a heart of health. Kills user if you have less than half a heart of health.

item.name: Duality
item.active_effect: Reroll all of your current stats and passive items within their respective item pool. If you have no passive items, gain a random floor reward item instead.

item.name: Garlic
item.description: Bad breath is the best defense!
item.effect: Breathe on enemies and posion them for 5 seconds, dealing rapid tick damage which concludes to 5 damage per second.

item.name: Snowman
item.description: Why is this thing still here? It doesn't even make sense!
item.active_effect: When taking damage, create a snowman familiar that shoots weak snowballs for 5 seconds.
